seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: 1 REMOTE TO CONTROL 8 DEVICES - Easily control your TV, Set Top Box, DVD/Blu-ray player, Media Streamers, (IR) Game consoles, Soundbars and other Audio devices with this handy remote. The Contour 8 operates TV, LCD, Plasma, SAT/CABLE/ DVB-T, Freeview, DVD, Blu Ray, Amplifier, Audio, Home Cinema, Media streamers up to 8 devices.
EASY SETUP - Follow 3 simple steps to setup your remote in literally less than a minute. An easy to understand quick setup guide is included in the packaging.
LEARNING FEATURE - Additionally to its easy setup, you can simply use the learning feature to fully customise this remote with ease, by copying functions directly from your original remote
100% COMPATIBLE: Guaranteed to work all Audio-Video brands
ONE FOR ALL is the world leader in remote controls, guaranteed to work all brands
description: Product Description One For All Contour 8 Remote Control (URC1280) The One For All Contour 8 is perfect to control your 8 devices: TV, Set Top Box (Sat/Freeview/Cable), DVD/Blu-ray player, Media Streamers, (IR) Game consoles, Soundbars, Amplifiers, Stereos and other Audio devices. This handy Universal remote gives you easy control of all your devices as on your original remotes! Follow 3 simple steps to setup your remote in literally less than a minute. An easy to understand quick setup guide is included in the packaging. Use the learning feature to fully customise this remote with ease, by copying functions directly from your original remote. One For All is the world leader in universal remotes controls. One For All universal remotes are 100% compatible and guaranteed to work all brands. Box Contains URC1280
